channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Clayton Kershaw won't pitch for the Dodgers in playoffs after big toe injury fails to heal
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Clayton Kershaw, sidelined since late August with a toe injury, won’t pitch again this season for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Ticket stub from Michael Jordan's NBA debut, 1998 game-worn jersey autograph card hit auction
item.description: Two rare Michael Jordan items, including a 1984 Bulls box office stub and a 1998 UD Basketball card, are up for auction in New York through October 19, along with other sports memorabilia including a 1914 Babe Ruth Orioles photo and a 1951 Bowman Mantle card.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Padres beat Braves to advance to NLDS
item.description: The Padres booked their ticket to the National League Division Series on Wednesday, defeating the Atlanta Braves 5-4 in Game 2 of the Wild Card Series at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA March Madness returning to San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- March Madness is returning to San Francisco, to Chase Center, specifically. On Wednesday, the NCAA announced that SF's Chase Center will host the 2028 Division I Men's Basketball West Regionals. The West Coast Conference will serve as the host.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: High School Boys Golf: Grand Junction shines in regionals, state tournaments set
item.description: This week, the 4A Region 4 tournament took place at Black Canyon Golf Course in Montrose. If we learned anything, it's that the Grand Junction Tigers are for real.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jets' undisciplined play raises questions about head coach's leadership
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – We entered the season, and the sky was the limit for the Jets and expectations on the season. Four games in, and after a terrible 10-9 loss to the Broncos on Sunday, many things are being called into question.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Pete Rose speaks with KTLA 5 in final interview
item.description: Pete Rose, Major League Baseball's all-time leader in hits and one of baseball's most divisive figures, died Monday at his home in Las Vegas. He was 83.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: (KRON) -- Baseball legend Pete Rose died Monday at the age of 83. Rose's complicated legacy includes being MLB's all-time hits leader but being banned from the league for gambling on games. He died Monday morning in his Las Vegas home, TMZ said. The outlet did not reveal a cause of death.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Chastain passes Truex on late restart to win NASCAR Cup Series race at Kansas Speedway
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Kan. (AP) — Ross Chastain finally got to smash a watermelon for the first time this season Sunday at Kansas Speedway. Smashed the hopes of a bunch of playoff drivers trying to earn an automatic berth in the next round, too.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gives up another late goal, settles for 2-2 draw
item.description: AUSTIN, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, Real Salt Lake looked like it had victory in its grasp. But for the second straight game, RSL gave up a late goal and had to settle for a draw.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Jalen Hurts and Eagles head to Tampa Bay looking to avenge lopsided postseason loss to Buccaneers
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers know how it feels to go on the road with added motivation to beat the team that eliminated them from the previous season's playoffs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah Royals beat Racing Lousiville 1-0
item.description: In their third-to-last home game of the season, Utah Royals FC beat Racing Louisville 1-0 off of a goal from Ana Tejada. There were chances from both sides during the match, but only one shot made it into the back of the net on the night.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4
